title: liquidambar poilanei
intro: Liquidambar poilanei, also known as the Lao Sweetgum or Liquidambar poilanei, is a species of flowering plant in the family Altingiaceae, native to Laos and Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Liquidambar poilanei include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Liquidambar poilanei include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
